questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: In a study group, 18 students know Python, 12 know SQL, and 7 know both. How many know Python but do not know SQL?
questions.explanation: Python only = 18 - 7 = 11.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: If I ___ more time yesterday, I would have finished the project.
questions.explanation: This is a third conditional sentence: if + past perfect, would have + past participle.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which time complexity best matches binary search on a sorted array?
questions.explanation: Binary search halves the search range on each step.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Three tasks must be scheduled in this order: A before B, and B before C. Which statement must be true?
questions.explanation: If A is before B and B is before C, then A must be before C.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Read the sentence: 'The company cut meeting time by 30%, which gave engineers longer uninterrupted periods for deep work.' What is the main effect described?

choices.A: Engineers were asked to attend more meetings
choices.B: Engineers had more focused work time

questions.explanation: The sentence says less meeting time created longer uninterrupted periods for deep work.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which SQL clause is used to filter rows before grouping?
questions.explanation: WHERE filters rows before aggregation; HAVING filters groups after aggregation.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Argument: 'Every intern on this team knows Git. Marta is an intern on this team.' Which conclusion follows logically?

choices.B: Some team members do not know Git

questions.explanation: The statement applies to every intern on the team, and Marta is one of them.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: The migration to cloud infrastructure improved system ___ during peak traffic.
questions.explanation: After 'improved system', a noun is needed: reliability.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which protocol is primarily used to provide secure communication over the web?
questions.explanation: HTTPS is HTTP over TLS/SSL and is used for secure web communication.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A book club has 40 members. 65% attended the first meeting, and 15 of those attendees also joined a workshop afterwards. How many attended the meeting but did not join the workshop?
questions.explanation: 65% of 40 is 26. Of those, 15 joined the workshop, so 26 - 15 = 11 attended only the meeting.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: The final report ___ by Friday so that we can submit it on Monday.
questions.explanation: A passive construction is needed: must be finished.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which data structure follows the Last In, First Out principle?
questions.explanation: A stack is LIFO: the last element pushed is the first popped.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Claim: 'We should install soundproof panels in the office because productivity dropped after we switched to open seating.' Which assumption is needed?

choices.A: Open seating reduced productivity partly because of noise
choices.C: All teams work on the same tasks
choices.D: The office budget will double next year

questions.explanation: The argument links open seating to lower productivity and proposes a noise-related solution, so it assumes noise is part of the cause.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Sentence: 'Although the rollout was delayed, customer satisfaction rose because the team fixed the most visible bugs before release.' What can be inferred?

choices.A: Customers were unhappy about bug fixes
choices.B: The delay likely improved product quality
choices.C: The rollout happened earlier than planned

questions.explanation: The sentence connects the delay with bug fixing and better satisfaction, so the delay likely helped quality.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of a primary key in a relational table?
questions.explanation: A primary key uniquely identifies each row in a table.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Four presentations will be given: D must be before B, A must be after C, and C is first. Which statement must be true?
questions.explanation: Only the relation D before B is explicitly required in every valid order.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: Her explanation was clear and extremely ___.
questions.explanation: After was and extremely, an adjective is needed: persuasive.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which of the following is a private IPv4 address?
questions.explanation: 172.16.0.0 to 172.31.255.255 is a private address range.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: All data analysts in the company use spreadsheets. Some interns are data analysts. Which conclusion follows?
questions.explanation: If some interns are analysts, and all analysts use spreadsheets, then some interns use spreadsheets.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: If she were more organized, she ___ all the deadlines last month.
questions.explanation: This is a mixed conditional: present condition, past result.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which sign most strongly suggests a phishing email?

choices.A: A message from a known sender with expected context
choices.B: A request to verify credentials through an urgent unfamiliar link
choices.D: A calendar invite from your teammate

questions.explanation: Urgency plus credential requests through unfamiliar links is a classic phishing pattern.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: The average of five numbers is 18. Four of the numbers are 14, 17, 19, and 20. What is the fifth number?
questions.explanation: If the average is 18, the total is 90. The known four sum to 70, so the missing number is 20.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: The new dashboard gives managers better ___ into customer behavior.
questions.explanation: The fixed collocation is give insight into.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Why do teams commonly create feature branches in Git?

choices.B: To isolate work before merging it into the main branch

questions.explanation: Feature branches isolate in-progress changes and make review and merging safer.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: In a class, 24 students study math, 18 study physics, and 9 study both. How many study at least one of the two subjects?
questions.explanation: Use inclusion-exclusion: 24 + 18 - 9 = 33.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: She worked through the night, so she ___ be tired now.
questions.explanation: Must is used for strong logical deduction in the present.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What best describes supervised learning?

choices.D: Only using images as training data

questions.explanation: Supervised learning uses input-output pairs or labeled examples.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Claim: 'We should move the help center article higher on the page because customers do not see it soon enough.' Which fact best strengthens the claim?

choices.A: Most support tickets are about topics already explained in that article
choices.B: The company plans to hire more designers next year
choices.C: The article uses a sans-serif font

questions.explanation: If many tickets are about topics already covered, making the article more visible would likely reduce confusion and ticket volume.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: She is ___ engineer who led ___ migration to the new platform.
questions.explanation: Engineer begins with a vowel sound, so an engineer. A specific migration is the migration.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of virtual memory?

choices.A: To permanently store files on a USB drive
choices.B: To let the system use disk space as an extension of RAM

questions.explanation: Virtual memory allows the OS to use secondary storage to extend the usable memory space.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A price was increased by 20% and then decreased by 20%. Compared with the original price, the final price is:
questions.explanation: 1.2 x 0.8 = 0.96, so the result is 4% below the start.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: By the time we arrived, the lecture ___.
questions.explanation: Past perfect shows the earlier action before another point in the past.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which SQL statement is used to remove rows from a table without deleting the table itself?
questions.explanation: DELETE removes rows, while DROP removes the whole table object.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Find the next number in the sequence: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?
questions.explanation: The differences are +4, +6, +8, +10, so next is +12.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the closest meaning to "reliable".
questions.explanation: Reliable means dependable or trustworthy.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which protocol is mainly used to securely load web pages in a browser?
questions.explanation: HTTPS is the secure version of HTTP.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: All startups in the incubator submit weekly reports. NovaTech is in the incubator. Which conclusion is valid?

choices.A: NovaTech may submit monthly reports only

questions.explanation: If all incubator startups submit weekly reports and NovaTech is one of them, then NovaTech does too.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: Her explanation was clear and very ___.
questions.explanation: After "very" we need an adjective describing the explanation.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of a unit test?

choices.A: To check one small component in isolation

questions.explanation: Unit tests verify a small part of the program independently.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: In a group, the ratio of developers to designers is 5:3. If there are 24 people total, how many are designers?
questions.explanation: Total parts = 8, so each part is 3. Designers = 3 x 3 = 9.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: You ___ back up your files regularly; otherwise you may lose your work.
questions.explanation: The sentence expresses recommendation or advice.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which state best describes a process that is waiting for CPU time but ready to run?
questions.explanation: A ready process has everything needed except CPU allocation.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: The average of four numbers is 18. If three of them are 15, 20 and 19, what is the fourth number?
questions.explanation: Sum of four numbers is 72. The known three sum to 54, so the fourth is 18.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: If a text says a solution is "cost-effective", it most likely means it is:
questions.explanation: Cost-effective means giving good value for the cost.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which measure most directly improves account security?
questions.explanation: MFA adds an additional verification factor and directly improves account security.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: If M is taller than N, and N is taller than P, which statement must be true?
questions.explanation: The relation is transitive: M > N > P, so M > P.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: She wants to become ___ engineer.
questions.explanation: Engineer begins with a vowel sound, so we use "an".

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which data structure works on the principle First In, First Out?
questions.explanation: Queue follows FIFO order.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Which fact best strengthens the claim that a campus should extend library hours?

choices.B: Many students study after evening classes end

questions.explanation: This fact directly supports the need for later access.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: If I knew the answer, I ___ you now.
questions.explanation: This is a second conditional: if + past simple, would + base verb.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which HTTP method is commonly used to retrieve data without changing server state?
questions.explanation: GET is typically used for safe retrieval operations.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A bag contains 3 red and 2 blue balls. What is the probability of drawing a blue ball at random?
questions.explanation: There are 2 blue balls out of 5 total.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the natural collocation: The team ___ a decision after the meeting.
questions.explanation: The standard collocation is "make a decision".

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Database normalization is mainly used to reduce:
questions.explanation: Normalization helps reduce data redundancy and update anomalies.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Five students stand in a line. O is before P, P is before R, and Q is after R. Which pair must appear in this order?
questions.explanation: From O before P before R, O must be before R.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: If a passage states that demand "rose sharply", demand:
questions.explanation: Rose sharply means increased quickly and significantly.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which OOP concept hides internal implementation details behind a public interface?
questions.explanation: Encapsulation bundles data and behavior and hides internals behind methods.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A company claims remote work improved productivity because more tasks were completed last month. Which assumption is most necessary?

choices.A: The number and difficulty of tasks stayed comparable

questions.explanation: Without comparable task volume and difficulty, the productivity comparison is weak.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: The new platform ___ next month.
questions.explanation: This is future passive: will be launched.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which backup approach best reduces the risk of losing data after ransomware?

choices.A: Keeping one writable copy on the same machine

questions.explanation: Offline or immutable/versioned backups help recovery when live data is encrypted.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Out of 40 students, 22 study Python, 18 study JavaScript, and 10 study both. How many study only Python?
questions.explanation: Only Python = 22 - 10 = 12.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: I ___ this book yet, so please do not spoil the ending.
questions.explanation: Present perfect fits with "yet" and the present situation.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is a common benefit of adding an index to a database table?

choices.D: Lower RAM usage in every case

questions.explanation: Indexes usually improve read performance for matching queries.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A bus travels 180 km in 3 hours. What is its average speed?
questions.explanation: Average speed = distance / time = 180 / 3 = 60 km/h.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: The reports ___ by Friday every week.
questions.explanation: This is a routine action in the passive voice.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is the main function of a router?
questions.explanation: Routers forward traffic between networks.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A team wants to switch to shorter meetings because they believe this will improve productivity. Which fact best supports the idea?

choices.A: Meetings often repeat information already written in chat
choices.B: The office has a new coffee machine

questions.explanation: If meetings repeat written information, shortening them could save time and improve productivity.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: If the paragraph compares several methods and ends by recommending one of them, the main idea is most likely:

choices.B: An evaluation leading to a recommendation

questions.explanation: The paragraph structure suggests comparison and recommendation.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is the most direct use of a debugger?

choices.A: To observe code execution step by step

questions.explanation: A debugger lets you inspect program flow and variable state.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: All certified analysts passed the final exam. Oksana is a certified analyst. What follows?

choices.A: Oksana may have skipped the exam

questions.explanation: If all certified analysts passed and Oksana is one, then she passed.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: That ___ be the correct file; it has the wrong name.
questions.explanation: "Can't" expresses strong negative deduction.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Ransomware is malware that mainly aims to:
questions.explanation: Ransomware locks or encrypts data and asks for payment.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: What is 3/4 of 120?

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: Their decision was based on careful ___.
questions.explanation: After "careful" and "based on" we need a noun: analysis.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: A functional requirement describes:
questions.explanation: Functional requirements define system behavior or capabilities.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: If 4 notebooks cost 200 UAH, how much do 7 notebooks cost at the same price?
questions.explanation: One notebook costs 50 UAH, so 7 cost 350 UAH.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: In a text, the pronoun "they" most often refers to:
questions.explanation: Pronouns usually refer back to previously mentioned nouns.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is a file extension mainly used for?
questions.explanation: Extensions help identify file format or associated application.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A manager says switching to a new tool increased output because output rose the next month. Which fact weakens this claim most?

choices.A: The team was larger that month
choices.B: The tool has a dark theme

questions.explanation: A larger team is an alternative explanation for higher output.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: If she ___ earlier, she would catch the train every day.
questions.explanation: Second conditional uses past simple in the if-clause.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: In machine learning, training data is used to:

choices.A: Teach a model patterns from examples

questions.explanation: Training data helps the model learn relationships or patterns.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A student answered 27 out of 30 questions correctly. What percentage is that?

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: The app ___ we tested yesterday worked well.
questions.explanation: "Which" refers to a thing: the app.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which construct is best for repeating an action while a condition remains true?
questions.explanation: A loop repeats steps according to a condition.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: One project took 6 days, another took 8 days, and a third took 10 days. What is the median duration?
questions.explanation: For three ordered values, the median is the middle one: 8.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: If an article describes a plan as "overdue but promising", the tone is best described as:
questions.explanation: The phrase combines criticism with hope.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is the main goal of a sorting algorithm?

choices.A: To arrange data in a defined order

questions.explanation: Sorting arranges elements by a chosen order.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Choose the best analogy: Teacher is to school as doctor is to ___.
questions.explanation: The relation is profession to common place of work.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: She is interested ___ data analysis.
questions.explanation: The correct collocation is "interested in".

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Cloud computing mainly allows users to:

choices.A: Access computing resources over the internet

questions.explanation: Cloud services provide computing resources through internet-based platforms.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: The average of five test scores is 14. The first four scores sum to 50. What is the fifth score?
questions.explanation: Total sum is 70, so the fifth score is 20.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the best option: Look at those clouds. It ___.
questions.explanation: Visible evidence suggests "is going to".

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: A SQL JOIN is used to:
questions.explanation: JOIN combines data from related tables based on a condition.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A rectangle has length 9 and width 4. What is its area?
questions.explanation: Area of a rectangle = length x width = 36.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: If a sentence says a process is "time-consuming", it probably means the process:
questions.explanation: Time-consuming means requiring much time.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Which password is generally strongest?
questions.explanation: A longer mixed password with symbols and unpredictability is stronger.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Which statement most clearly shows cause and effect?

choices.A: The team used a planner, and deadlines were met more often
choices.B: The office is on the third floor

questions.explanation: The planner is presented as a reason for improved deadlines.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: This task is ___ than the previous one.
questions.explanation: The correct comparative form is "easier".

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: RAM is mainly used for:
questions.explanation: RAM stores data temporarily while programs run.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A coin is tossed once. What is the probability of getting heads?
questions.explanation: For a fair coin, heads has probability 1/2.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: He said that he ___ tired.
questions.explanation: Reported speech usually backshifts present to past.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is a function in programming?

choices.A: A named block of reusable code

questions.explanation: Functions package reusable logic under a name.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A laptop price dropped from 25,000 UAH to 20,000 UAH. What was the discount percentage?
questions.explanation: The drop is 5,000 out of 25,000, which is 20%.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: If a writer presents several risks and then offers practical steps, the purpose is most likely to:
questions.explanation: The structure suggests warning plus practical guidance.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: DNS mainly translates:
questions.explanation: DNS resolves names like example.com to IP addresses.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: A report says a pilot course had low attendance but high completion among attendees. Which inference is most reasonable?

choices.A: Everyone in the city completed it
choices.B: Those who joined were engaged enough to finish
choices.C: The course was canceled before finishing
choices.D: Attendance and completion mean the same thing

questions.explanation: High completion among attendees suggests good engagement of those who joined.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: She decided ___ a short break.
questions.explanation: "Decide" is followed by the infinitive.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: What is a main advantage of version control?

choices.D: Reducing all bugs to zero instantly

questions.explanation: Version control records history and supports collaboration.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: If A finishes before B, and C finishes after B, who must finish last among A, B, C?
questions.explanation: From A before B and C after B, C must be last.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the natural collocation: We need to ___ attention to the details.
questions.explanation: The fixed expression is "pay attention".

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Virtualization allows one physical machine to:
questions.explanation: Virtualization lets multiple virtual machines share one physical host.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: What is the result of -3 + 8?
questions.explanation: Adding 8 to -3 gives 5.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: If instructions say "install the update before restarting", which action comes first?
questions.explanation: The instruction explicitly gives the order.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Social engineering attacks mainly exploit:
questions.explanation: They manipulate people rather than only technical systems.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Which sentence works best as a concise summary of a text describing a problem, evidence, and proposed solution?

choices.A: It presents an issue, supports it with evidence, and suggests a fix

questions.explanation: A good summary keeps the main structure: issue, support, solution.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: There are ___ mistakes in your draft, so the overall quality is good.
questions.explanation: "Few" is used with countable plural nouns like mistakes.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: Email spam detection is often treated as what kind of ML task?
questions.explanation: The model classifies emails into categories such as spam or not spam.

questions.subject: tznk
questions.prompt: Find the next number: 3, 9, 27, 81, ?
questions.explanation: Each term is multiplied by 3.

questions.subject: english
questions.prompt: Choose the correct option: She usually ___ to work by bus, but today she is walking.
questions.explanation: "Usually" calls for present simple: she goes.

questions.subject: it
questions.prompt: An API is best described as:
questions.explanation: APIs define how software components communicate.
